overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia running through a grassy field at night. The character moves steadily toward a distant forest line under a dark blue-green sky with low ambient lighting.

agents.ego_description: Geralt is running steadily through the tall grass, making slight left and right adjustments while heading toward the distant forest tree line

entered.detail: Dark silhouette of dense trees forming the horizon boundary against the night sky
Dense green grass covering the ground with varying heights and scattered wildflowers
Dark blue-green night sky with faint atmospheric haze and cloud cover

segments.scene_description: Geralt runs steadily through an open grassland at night, the camera following from behind in third-person perspective. The landscape is dominated by tall grass and a distant forest tree line under a dark blue sky. The character makes minor course corrections while traversing the empty natural terrain, with no other entities or structures present.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate grassland at night as the character advances toward a distant forest. It begins with a third-person perspective following Geralt from behind as he runs steadily through an expanse of tall grass. As he traverses the empty natural terrain, the camera maintains its steady pace, capturing minor course corrections in his path. The scene then persists in its singular focus on the dark blue sky and the looming tree line that defines the horizon. Finally, the movement continues across the open landscape, emphasizing the isolation of the environment under the low ambient light.
